**Domain/Topic**
Which area of condensed matter physics does this cover?
- [ ] Superconductivity
- [ ] Topological phases
- [ ] Correlated electron systems
- [ ] Quantum magnetism
- [ ] Soft matter
- [ ] Other: _______

**Content type**
- [ ] Paper summary (arXiv link: _______)
- [ ] Textbook chapter notes
- [ ] Lecture notes
- [ ] Dataset description
- [ ] Other: _______

**Description**
Brief description of the physics content you're contributing.

**Source material**
- Paper DOI/arXiv: 
- Textbook reference:
- License (if applicable):

**Files to add/modify**
List the files you'll add or modify in `data/raw/` or elsewhere.

**Quality checklist**
- [ ] Content is accurate and peer-reviewed (if paper)
- [ ] Proper citations included
- [ ] No AI-generated summaries (original sources only)
- [ ] Format matches existing structure

**Additional context**
Any notes for reviewers about this contribution.
